name: Get Past Walk In Tubs Prospects

content.query:
SELECT 
lds.Division
,lds.[LP_ProductID]
--,prd.LongDescription as ProductLongDescription
,lds.CustomerID
,cst.FirstName
,cst.LastName
,cst.Address1
,cst.City
,cst.[State]
,cst.Zip
,cst.Email
,cst.Phone
,lds.[EntryDate]
,lds.[GrossSalesAmount]
,lds.[LP_DispositionID]
,lds.[LP_LeadSourceID]
,lds.[LP_LeadSubSourceID]
,srs.LeadSubSource
,srs.SourceCode
 FROM 
 [EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
 ,[EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
 ,[EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs
 WHERE
 lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
 and lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
 --and lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
 --and lds.Division = prd.Division
 --and lds.LP_DispositionID = 'Sale'
 and lds.ProductID in
 ('HSI-KohlerTub',
'HSI-Tubs',
'HSI-Tubs2',
'MXH-WIT',
'MXH-Tub',
'MXH-SSWIT',
'MXH-KWIT',
'MXH-JWIT',
'PBC-Tub',
'PBC-WIB',
'PHI-WalkIn Tub',
'SWR-WalkIn Tub',
'SWR-AusWalkIn',
'SWR-DlsHDWalk',
'SWR-DlsWalkIn',
'SWR-K TUB',
'SWR-K-CHOREO',
'SWR-K-NO WIB C',
'SWR-K-NON WIB')
